description_long: This is a compact, freestanding metal oven with a robust, boxy structure and a slightly arched front door. The front features a decorative, arched window with a geometric grill pattern, allowing a view into the oven's interior. A prominent cylindrical flue pipe extends vertically from the top surface, curving backward and terminating in a square mounting plate, suggesting it is designed for venting smoke or heat. The oven stands on four short, sturdy legs, elevating it slightly above the ground. The exterior is finished in a matte, light gray color, with subtle signs of wear and discoloration near the base, indicating use or exposure to heat. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal ornamentation aside from the front grillwork.
description: A compact, freestanding metal oven with a decorative arched front window and a prominent curved flue pipe on top. The oven is finished in matte gray and stands on four short legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the arched window with decorative grillwork and the flue pipe rising from the top.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the plain, solid side panel and the curved flue pipe extending backward.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat back panel and the square mounting plate at the end of the flue pipe.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the unadorned side and the flue pipe's curvature.
attribute_control_panel_design: No visible control panel or external controls are present on any side of the oven. The design is minimalistic, with no knobs, buttons, or display elements apparent.
attribute_door_handle_type: The door handle is integrated into the lower edge of the arched window frame, appearing as a subtle horizontal lip or pull. It is made of the same metal as the door, with no protruding or decorative features.
attribute_window_presence: present; the oven door features a large, arched window with a decorative grill, centrally placed on the front.
